titleStmt.title: Transcription and Translation of DCA DCD Misc. Ch. 5948

availability.p: Status unknown. Exported for research and migration workflows.

revisionDesc.change: transcription moa=794 status=reviewed modified=2022-11-01 13:36:57.890857+00 | translation moa=795 status=reviewed modified=2022-11-01 13:36:57.900658+00

p.cl: Omnibus Christi fidelibus ad quos presens scriptum peruenerit Robertus filius Reginaldi de Magna Ristona Salutem .

me veraciter intellexisse per multa Indicia quod nec ego nec antecessores mei habere debuimus in territorio uille Magne Ristone nisi unam
carucatam terre tantum scilicet . Quinquies viginti acras . et quinque . Hinc est quod notum facio vniuersitati uestre me resignasse . et quietas clamasse
pro me et heredibus meis . et per fustum et Baculum reddidisse in curia domini mei prioris de Coldingham . Priori et monachis dunelmensibus
apud Coldingham deo seruientibus et In perpetuum ibidem seruituris omnes terras quas uel ego uel predecessores mei ultra unam carucatam terre iniuste
occupauimus et detinuimus in territorio uille de Magna Ristona . scilicet In Ilvingishope septem acras . In Langelandis decem et octo acras .
et dimidiam . In Mers  duodecim acras et dimidiam . Totam terram In Alaynescastel pro duabus acris . In Bilielawe . duas acras . In campo
qui vocatur Swinewde ex australi parte de Aye . octo acras . Ita quod nec ego nec successores mei in dictis terris aliquod ius aut clamium
de cetero habere poterimus . Hanc autem resignationem et quietam clamcionem feci dictis monachis pro salute anime mee et omnium antecessorum
meorum et successorum .
Et ut hec resignacion et quieta clamacio in perpetuum Robur firmitatis optineant presenti scripto sigillum meum apposui .

Hiis Testibus . Domino Willelmo de Morthintona . Domino Alano de Swintona . Domino Ada de Prendergest . Waltero . Andrea . Alexandro . de Paxtona . Willelmo
vicaria de Aldekambus . Roberto filio Gregorii . Ada de Parua Ristona . Bertramo filio eius . Iohanne filio Elye de superiori Aytona . Mauricio
filio Merlini . Radulfo preposito de Coldingham . Rogero filio eius . Ada filio Ylif de Aldenegrawe . Dauid de Quiqwiswde et Multis Aliis .
To all Christ's faithful to whom the present writing shall have come, Robert son of Reginald of Great Reston sends greeting.

truly to have come to know, by many proofs, that I and my ancestors ought to have in the territory of the town of Great Riston but one ploughgate of land only, that is, one-hundred-and-five acres. Hence it is that I make known to you all that I have resigned, and have quitclaimed for myself and my heirs, and by rod and staff returned in the court of my lord, the prior of Coldingham, to the prior and monks of Durham at Coldingham serving God in that place now and for ever in the future, all the lands which I or my predecessors unjustly occupied and withheld above one ploughate of land in the territory of the toun of Great Reston; that is, in seven acres in Ilvingishope, eighteen-and-a-half acres in Langelandis, twelve-and-a-half acres in Mers, the whole land in Alaynescastel in return for two acres, two acres in Bilielawe, eight acres in the grassland which is called Swinwood, on the south side of the Eye [Water]; so that neither I nor my successors shall in the future be able to have any right or claim in the said lands. And this resignation and quitclaim I have made to the said monks for the salvation of my own soul and of all my ancestors' and successors' [souls].
And so that this resignation and quitclaim should have validity and strength I have applied my seal to the present writing.
